subcodes.first_line: The Book which the Wronged One hath revealed unto him who hath believed in God, the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting, that He may transform his sorrow into joy and acquaint him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله المظلوم لمن آمن بالله المهیمن القیوم لیبدل حزنه بالسرور و یعرفه
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @consolation and comfort, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @Muhammad; Islam, @prayers (general or uncategorized)
